module_summaries.summary:
Users can log in or access courses as a guest.
Displays login form with username and password fields.

Users can view upcoming activities and deadlines.
Displays personalized greeting, timeline, and calendar.

Users can search and sort their enrolled courses.
Displays course cards with images and categories.

Users can navigate course content and sections.
Displays course name, tabs, and section details.

Teachers can add and edit course activities.
Displays editing tools and activity options.

Teachers can configure course settings.
Displays course properties and configuration options.

Teachers can manage course enrollments.
Displays enrolled users and filtering options.

Teachers can view and grade assignments.
Displays assignment details and grading summary.

Teachers can filter and grade student submissions.
Displays submission table with grading options.

Students can submit assignments.
Displays assignment details and submission form.

Teachers can create advanced grading methods.
Displays grading method options and notifications.

Teachers can view and filter grade reports.
Displays grade table with filtering options.

Students can view their grades and feedback.
Displays grade table with detailed breakdown.

Students can view all course activities.
Displays activities organized by type and status.

Users can view and edit their profile information.
Displays user details and profile settings.

test_cases.title: Successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter a valid username
Enter a valid password
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the Dashboard

test_cases.title: Access as a guest
steps: Click the Access as a guest button
test_cases.expected_result: Access granted as a guest without login

test_cases.title: Cookies notice button functionality
steps: Click the Cookies notice button
test_cases.expected_result: Cookies notice is accepted and disappears

test_cases.title: Verify personalized greeting displays correctly
steps: Check the top of the dashboard for the personalized greeting
test_cases.expected_result: The greeting displays 'Hi, [Name]!' with a waving hand emoji

test_cases.title: Verify Search field functionality
steps: Enter a search term in the Search field
Press Enter or click the search icon
test_cases.expected_result: Search results relevant to the entered term are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify New event button functionality
steps: Click on the New event button
test_cases.expected_result: A form or modal to create a new event is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify Next 7 days dropdown functionality
steps: Click on the Next 7 days dropdown
Select an option from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The selected option is applied and displayed correctly

test_cases.title: Verify Sort by dates dropdown functionality
steps: Click on the Sort by dates dropdown
Select an option from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The selected sorting option is applied and displayed correctly

test_cases.title: Verify All courses dropdown functionality
steps: Click on the All courses dropdown
Select a course from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The selected course is displayed correctly

test_cases.title: Verify Navigation arrows functionality
steps: Click on the navigation arrows
test_cases.expected_result: The content navigates to the previous or next section

test_cases.title: Verify Full calendar link functionality
steps: Click on the Full calendar link
test_cases.expected_result: The full calendar view is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify Import or export calendars link functionality
steps: Click on the Import or export calendars link
test_cases.expected_result: Options to import or export calendars are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify Edit mode toggle functionality
steps: Toggle the Edit mode
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard switches to edit mode, allowing modifications

test_cases.title: Verify Reset page to default button functionality
steps: Click on the Reset page to default button
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard resets to its default layout

test_cases.title: Verify + Add a block button functionality
steps: Click on the + Add a block button
test_cases.expected_result: The Add a block modal is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify Three-dot menu functionality
steps: Click on the Three-dot menu
test_cases.expected_result: Options related to the block or item are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify Add a block modal X button functionality
test_cases.preconditions: Add a block modal is open
steps: Click on the X button in the Add a block modal
test_cases.expected_result: The Add a block modal is closed

test_cases.title: Verify Add a block modal Cancel button functionality
test_cases.preconditions: Add a block modal is open
steps: Click on the Cancel button in the Add a block modal
test_cases.expected_result: The Add a block modal is closed

test_cases.title: Verify Add a block page Cancel link functionality
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Add a block page
steps: Click on the Cancel link
test_cases.expected_result: The user is returned to the previous page or dashboard

test_cases.title: Verify Move icon functionality
steps: Drag and drop a block using the Move icon
test_cases.expected_result: The block is moved to the new location

test_cases.title: Verify search functionality in the search field
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and enrolled in courses
steps: Enter a course name in the search field
Press Enter or click the search icon
test_cases.expected_result: Courses matching the search term are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify functionality of 'All' dropdown
steps: Click on the 'All' dropdown
Select a different category from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are filtered according to the selected category

test_cases.title: Verify sorting functionality by course name
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and enrolled in multiple courses
steps: Click on the 'Sort by course name' dropdown
Select an option to sort courses
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are sorted according to the selected option

test_cases.title: Verify 'Star this course' option functionality
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and enrolled in courses
steps: Click on the three-dot menu on a course card
Select 'Star this course' option
test_cases.expected_result: The course is marked as starred

test_cases.title: Verify 'Remove from view' option functionality
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and enrolled in courses
steps: Click on the three-dot menu on a course card
Select 'Remove from view' option
test_cases.expected_result: The course is removed from the current view

test_cases.title: Verify Edit mode toggle is available
steps: Check for the presence of the Edit mode toggle
test_cases.expected_result: Edit mode toggle is available

test_cases.title: Verify collapsible chevron arrow is functional
steps: Click on the collapsible chevron arrow
test_cases.expected_result: Sections collapse or expand when the chevron arrow is clicked

test_cases.title: Verify Collapse all link collapses all sections
steps: Click on the Collapse all link
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are collapsed

test_cases.title: Verify Close button (X) is functional
steps: Click on the Close button (X)
test_cases.expected_result: Page or modal is closed

test_cases.title: Enable editing mode
steps: Click the edit mode toggle
test_cases.expected_result: Editing mode is enabled

test_cases.title: Open Activity Chooser
steps: Click the + button
test_cases.expected_result: Activity Chooser modal is displayed

test_cases.title: Select an activity from the Activity Chooser
steps: Select an activity or resource option from the grid
test_cases.expected_result: Selected activity or resource is highlighted

test_cases.title: Add selected activity to course
test_cases.preconditions: An activity or resource is selected in the Activity Chooser
steps: Click the Add button
test_cases.expected_result: Selected activity or resource is added to the course

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new activity or resource appears in the course content
post_verifications.reason: All candidate test cases focus on verifying the presence of navigation tabs and do not check the course content for new activities or resources.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually navigate to the course page and check the course sections to confirm the new activity or resource is listed.

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new activity appears in the student's activities overview
post_verifications.session_note: Login as a student enrolled in the course
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases confirm the presence of a new activity in the student's activities overview.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check the student's activities overview to confirm the new activity is listed.

coverage_gaps: All candidate test cases focus on verifying the presence of navigation tabs and do not check the course content for new activities or resources.
None of the test cases confirm the presence of a new activity in the student's activities overview.

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with all required fields
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Select 'Display description on course page' checkbox
Enter valid activity instructions
Upload a valid additional file
Enable 'Allow submissions from' and select a valid date
Enable 'Due date' and select a valid date
Enable 'Cut-off date' and select a valid date
Enable 'Remind me to grade by' and select a valid date
Select 'Always show description' checkbox
Select 'Online text' checkbox
Select 'File submissions' checkbox
Select a valid option from 'Maximum number of uploaded files' dropdown
Select a valid option from 'Maximum submission size' dropdown
Enter valid accepted file types
Select 'Send content change notification' checkbox
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and user is returned to the course page

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new assignment appears in the course content
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases access or display the course content to verify the presence of a new assignment.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually navigate to the Course Page and check the course sections for the new assignment to confirm it is listed in the course content.

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new assignment appears in the student's activities overview
post_verifications.session_note: Login as a student enrolled in the course
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases confirm the presence of a new assignment in the activities overview. They focus on due dates, submission statuses, and icons, which are not relevant to confirming the listing of a new assignment.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually log in as a student, navigate to the Activities section, and verify the new assignment is listed in the activities overview.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases access or display the course content to verify the presence of a new assignment.

None of the test cases confirm the presence of a new assignment in the activities overview. They focus on due dates, submission statuses, and icons, which are not relevant to confirming the listing of a new assignment.

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with 'Save and display'
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Click 'Save and display' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and the assignment page is displayed

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new assignment page is displayed with correct details
post_verifications.reason: All candidate test cases are related to displaying elements like the Course Index, navigation bar, or activity icons, none of which confirm the assignment page details.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually navigate to the new assignment page and verify that the assignment details are displayed correctly.

coverage_gaps: All candidate test cases are related to displaying elements like the Course Index, navigation bar, or activity icons, none of which confirm the assignment page details.

test_cases.title: Search for an activity using the search field
steps: Enter a search term in the search field
Verify the search results
test_cases.expected_result: Relevant activities or resources are displayed based on the search term

test_cases.title: Filter activities by category
steps: Select a category filter
Verify the filtered results
test_cases.expected_result: Activities or resources are filtered by the selected category

test_cases.title: Cancel new assignment creation
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Click 'Cancel' button
test_cases.expected_result: No assignment is created and changes are discarded

test_cases.title: Verify info button displays additional information
steps: Click the Info button for an activity or resource
test_cases.expected_result: Additional information about the activity or resource is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify star button marks activity as favorite
steps: Click the Star button for an activity or resource
test_cases.expected_result: Activity or resource is marked as favorite

test_cases.title: Save course settings with all required fields filled
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Course Settings page
steps: Enter a valid course full name
Enter a valid course short name
Select a valid course category from the dropdown
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Course settings are saved successfully and displayed

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the course settings are saved and displayed correctly
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Maximum upload size dropdown boundary test
post_verifications.execution_note: This test can verify that the course settings are saved successfully, but it only confirms the maximum upload size setting.
post_verifications.reason: The test operates on the correct module and confirms that a specific setting (maximum upload size) is saved successfully. However, it does not verify all course settings.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually verify that all course settings, not just the maximum upload size, reflect the saved changes on the course settings page.

coverage_gaps: The test operates on the correct module and confirms that a specific setting (maximum upload size) is saved successfully. However, it does not verify all course settings.

test_cases.title: Enroll a new user using email address
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid email address in the email field
Select a role from the Roles dropdown
Click the Enrol button
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled and appears in the Enrolled users dropdown

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new user appears in the enrolled users list
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify enrolled users dropdown displays correctly
post_verifications.execution_note: This test can be used to verify if the new user appears in the enrolled users dropdown, confirming the expected outcome.

test_cases.title: Edit an existing user's role
test_cases.preconditions: User is already enrolled in the course
steps: Locate the user in the Enrolled users dropdown
Click the Edit icon next to the user's name
Select a new role from the Roles dropdown
Click the Save button
test_cases.expected_result: User's role is updated and reflected in the Roles column

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the user's role is updated in the enrolled users list
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify role change is reflected in the Roles column
post_verifications.execution_note: Use this test to observe the Roles column for the user in the Enrolled users list before and after the action.
post_verifications.before_action: Record the user's current role before the action
post_verifications.after_action: Confirm the user's role is updated to the new role

test_cases.title: Remove an enrolled user
test_cases.preconditions: User is already enrolled in the course
steps: Locate the user in the Enrolled users dropdown
Click the Delete icon next to the user's name
Confirm the deletion
test_cases.expected_result: User is removed from the Enrolled users dropdown

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the user is removed from the enrolled users list
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify role change is reflected in the Roles column
post_verifications.execution_note: Use this test to observe the enrolled users list and check the Roles column for the presence of the user before and after the action.
post_verifications.before_action: Record the presence of the user in the list before the action
post_verifications.after_action: Confirm the user is no longer present in the list

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases access or display the roles of participants in the enrollment list.

post_verifications.before_action: Record the presence of selected participants in the list before the action
post_verifications.after_action: Confirm the selected participants are no longer present in the list

test_cases.title: Verify enrolled users dropdown displays correctly
steps: Observe the Enrolled users dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Enrolled users dropdown displays all currently enrolled users

test_cases.title: Verify role change is reflected in the Roles column

test_cases.title: Clear filters using Clear filters button

test_cases.title: Add multiple filter conditions

test_cases.title: Search users using a valid username
steps: Enter a valid username in the Search users field

test_cases.title: Grade a student submission
steps: Click the Grade button for a specific student submission
Enter a grade in the grade input field
Save the grade
test_cases.expected_result: The grade is saved and displayed correctly in the Submissions tab

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the grade is saved and displayed correctly in the submissions tab
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify final grade is displayed correctly
post_verifications.execution_note: This test can be used to verify that the final grade is displayed correctly in the submissions tab after the grade is saved.

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the grade appears in the student's grade report
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify student's own grades are displayed
post_verifications.execution_note: This test can verify that grades displayed belong to the logged-in student, but does not specifically confirm the presence of a new grade.
post_verifications.session_note: Login as the student who received the grade
post_verifications.reason: The test operates on the correct module and confirms grades are displayed for the logged-in student, but it does not specifically confirm the presence of a new grade.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: After executing the test, manually verify that the specific new grade is present in the student's grade report.

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the grade appears in the teacher's gradebook
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases access or display the specific data needed to confirm the new grade entry in the gradebook.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check the gradebook to confirm the new grade entry is present and correctly displayed.

coverage_gaps: The test operates on the correct module and confirms grades are displayed for the logged-in student, but it does not specifically confirm the presence of a new grade.
None of the test cases access or display the specific data needed to confirm the new grade entry in the gradebook.

test_cases.title: Verify submission status update after grading
steps: Check the Status column for the graded submission
test_cases.expected_result: Status is updated to reflect the grading

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the submission status is updated to reflect the grading
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify final grade is displayed correctly
post_verifications.execution_note: Use this test to observe the submission status before and after grading. The test already accesses the relevant module and displays grading-related data.
post_verifications.before_action: Record the current status of the submission before grading
post_verifications.after_action: Confirm the status has changed to reflect the grading

test_cases.title: Filter submissions by a specific name
steps: Select a specific name from the Filter by name dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Submissions table is filtered to show only the entries related to the selected name

Save the feedback

post_verifications.ideal: Verify feedback comments are saved and displayed correctly
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases access or confirm the display of feedback comments specifically. They focus on feedback files, grades, and final grades, which are different data points.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Develop a new test case that enters feedback comments for a submission and verifies that these comments are displayed correctly in the grading_actions state.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases access or confirm the display of feedback comments specifically. They focus on feedback files, grades, and final grades, which are different data points.

test_cases.expected_result: Feedback files are uploaded and displayed correctly

post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases specifically address the verification of feedback files being uploaded and displayed correctly. They focus on feedback comments and grades, not files.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually upload feedback files and check the display of these files in the grading_actions section of the Assignment Submissions module.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases specifically address the verification of feedback files being uploaded and displayed correctly. They focus on feedback comments and grades, not files.

test_cases.title: Create new grading form from scratch

Fill out the necessary fields to create a grading form

post_verifications.ideal: Verify a new grading form is created successfully

post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: After creating a new grading form from scratch, manually verify that the form appears in the list of available grading forms.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases confirm the creation of a new grading form from scratch. They either focus on creating from a template or verifying the availability of options.

test_cases.title: Create new grading form from a template
steps: Click on 'Create new grading form from a template' card option
Select a template from the available options
Submit the form
test_cases.expected_result: A new grading form is created from the selected template successfully

post_verifications.ideal: Verify a new grading form is created from the selected template successfully
post_verifications.reason: The available test cases do not confirm the expected outcome of a new grading form being created from a template. Test ID 11.1AG(O-002 is for creating a form from scratch, and Test ID 11.1AG(O-005 only verifies the availability of the option to create from a template, not the creation itself.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually verify that a new grading form is created from the selected template by checking the list of grading forms after the creation action.

coverage_gaps: The available test cases do not confirm the expected outcome of a new grading form being created from a template. Test ID 11.1AG(O-002 is for creating a form from scratch, and Test ID 11.1AG(O-005 only verifies the availability of the option to create from a template, not the creation itself.

post_verifications.after_action: Compare the grades in the BUS301 columns and confirm they reflect the new entries

post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases access or display the Overall average row in the Gradebook / Grader Report.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check the Overall average row before and after changes to verify the update.

coverage_gaps: The available test cases do not confirm the expected outcome of a new grading form being created from a template. Test ID 11.1AG(O-002 is for creating a form from scratch, and Test ID 11.1AG(O-005 only verifies the availability of the option to create from a template, not the creation itself.
None of the test cases access or display the course content to verify the presence of a new assignment.
The test operates on the correct module and confirms grades are displayed for the logged-in student, but it does not specifically confirm the presence of a new grade.
All candidate test cases are related to displaying elements like the Course Index, navigation bar, or activity icons, none of which confirm the assignment page details.
None of the test cases access or confirm the display of feedback comments specifically. They focus on feedback files, grades, and final grades, which are different data points.
The test operates on the correct module and confirms that a specific setting (maximum upload size) is saved successfully. However, it does not verify all course settings.
None of the test cases confirm the creation of a new grading form from scratch. They either focus on creating from a template or verifying the availability of options.
None of the test cases access or display the specific data needed to confirm the new grade entry in the gradebook.
None of the test cases access or display the roles of participants in the enrollment list.
All candidate test cases focus on verifying the presence of navigation tabs and do not check the course content for new activities or resources.
